findings.description: AzureClouds enum members use UPPER_SNAKE_CASE instead of PascalCase. Missing Known* prefix.
AzureSupportedClouds uses closed template literal type `${AzureClouds}` instead of string.

notes: first-typespec-migration PR. Same AzureClouds/AzureSupportedClouds pattern seen in arm-containerservicefleet (#37369) and arm-standbypool (#37572).
